Interface PMRDocument

All Superinterfaces:
Document, Node
All Known Subinterfaces:
AbstractCMLDocument
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractCMLDocumentImpl, PMRDocumentImpl
public interface PMRDocument extends Document
Delegation-based DOM
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
